title: Danny Sheehan on John E. Mack
summary: Danny Sheehan discusses his representation of Harvard psychiatrist John E. Mack for 10 years, including his involvement in vetting Mack's alien abduction experiencers and assessing their credibility as potential witnesses.

key_claims.claim: John Mack was the head of the Harvard Psychiatry department
Danny Sheehan represented John Mack for 10 years
Sheehan met dozens of people Mack had worked with and was involved in vetting them for credibility
Sheehan has talked to several totally credible witnesses that he could put in front of any American jury who would believe they were telling the truth
Bud Hopkins was John Mack's childhood friend
